title: Vikings
description:
A How to Train Your Dragon modpack that uses Isle of Berk.

I plan to make a complete new dragon mod, so hold your horses!
body:
A How to Train Your Dragon modpack that now uses Book of Dragons

I plan to make a complete new dragon mod, so hold your dragons!

This modpack adds QOL mods, biome generation mods, shaders, Essential's social menu, new animals, villagers, and ways to sleep! This modpack is made with the intention for players to be able to feel like they are in HTTYD, so there are added dungeons, and structures to explore! Because of these optimization mods, you will be able to explore and fly without fail! There is also Voice Chat included, so your friends can have fun with the proximity chat!

**Disclaimer, if your world doesn't create, increase your memory allocation in modrinth's 
settings.**


Older versions below version 5 use Isle of Berk and Archipelago Additions, so please consult the wiki accordingly.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
For users of version 5 and up,

**DRAGON RIDERS BEWARE!!! Please change the Carry On keybind, as shift is used for taming.**

Taming and incubating tutorial.
